title: HIPAA Security Rule — reference themes (Tron built-in, not legal advice)
disclaimer: Heuristic mapping for engineering review. Not a HIPAA risk analysis or BA agreement.

themes.summary: Access control — minimum necessary exposure of PHI in APIs, databases, and logs.
Audit controls — who accessed what, retention, and integrity of audit trails.
Transmission security — encryption in transit for PHI-bearing channels.
